summary: Full backend (pytest, 4/4 passed) + frontend (Playwright on 1440px and 390px) testing of VaxChain Monitor. All requested backend endpoints work correctly with no _id leakage and proper 404s. Frontend Start/Stop session, telemetry streaming, settings excursion injection, alert generation, navigation across all 6 pages, Leaflet maps on Cooling/Transport, CSV export and history replay all verified end-to-end without JS or console errors. Mobile sidebar toggle works.

issues: When sidebar drawer is open, the right-side dashboard content does not shift/dim and the section labels overlap the gauge values (e.g., 'CHAMBER TEMPERATURE' text overlaps '5.00') making it hard to read until the drawer is closed.
When the menu drawer is open, the Start/Stop button and STOPPED chip in the top bar are partially clipped/overlapped by the drawer panel.

action_items: (Minor) Improve mobile sidebar: make it a true overlay drawer with backdrop + close-on-outside-click rather than pushing/squishing content; ensure top bar Start/Stop remain visible when drawer is open.

(Optional) The default GEOFENCE_EXIT alert fires immediately at session start because no destination is set yet but a default geofence center exists. Consider only running geofence checks when destination is explicitly configured to avoid noise on first start.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py PATCH /api/sessions/{id} accepts a raw Dict[str,Any] without Pydantic validation — any caller can set arbitrary fields on a session document (e.g., vaccine_id, started_at). Recommend a SessionUpdate Pydantic model with whitelisted fields.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.93).
Telemetry GET endpoint hard-caps at limit=5000 with no pagination — a long session at 3s ticks will exceed this in ~4.2 hours. Consider time-window query params (since/until) and pagination.
No index on telemetry.session_id / sessions.started_at / alerts.session_id — list queries will scan as data grows. Add Mongo indexes on startup.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject; should restrict origins in production.
seed_data_creation: Backend startup auto-seeds 5 vaccines (tetanus, hepb, bcg, hib, ipv). Tests created several TEST_-tagged sessions/telemetry/alerts via API; kept in DB (not cleaned up) — safe because data is namespaced by sessionId.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_vaxchain_api.py cover vaccines listing, session lifecycle (create/get/list/patch/404), telemetry batch insert + retrieve (no _id leak), and alerts create/list/dismiss + 404. Frontend critical flows verified: Start session triggers LIVE chip + telemetry within ~5s, sensors/timer/PWM/GPS update, Settings page exposes all controls (testid prefix 'settings-*' and trigger-excursion-btn), excursion injection raises TEMP_RISING_FAST alert within ~8s, Sessions page export-csv-btn enabled, history-row-* + replay-* exist, Cooling and Transport pages render .leaflet-container, mobile sidebar via menu-toggle-btn works. Vaccine selector data-testid is 'vaccine-selector' (not 'vaccine-select'). Custom vaccine option uses Radix Select rendered in a portal — open the trigger then click option in the portal (could not verify in this run, no JS error, low priority).
